design_philosophy.vibe: Stunning like a brochure, premium, organized, trustworthy
principles: Generous spacing: Treat data and lists like editorial content, not dense spreadsheets.
Clear hierarchy: Use typography (Outfit) to create strict structure instead of relying purely on boxes and borders.
Warmth over clinical: Use earthy greens, sand, and terracotta to make the NDIS platform feel human and caring.
Intelligent AI UI: AI features should feel magical but grounded, using subtle glows and tracing borders.

headings.usage: H1-H4, editorial feel, tight tracking. MUST use tracking-tight.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.ai_containers: relative overflow-hidden bg-white border border-border rounded-xl before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-transparent before:via-accent/10 before:to-transparent before:animate-[shimmer_2s_infinite]

document_hub.layout: Bento grid for top-level folders. List view for files with generous row padding.
document_hub.style: Use colored icons and soft background tints for each folder type to make scanning easy. Implement a premium drag-and-drop zone.

pdf_viewer.overlay: Crystal Glass style (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl) over the main app, with a focused reading view.
pdf_viewer.toolbar: Floating pill-shaped toolbar centered at bottom or top, high contrast (dark mode style).

navigation.style: Modern left sidebar on desktop with subtle hover states. Top navbar for global search, AI assistant prompt, and profile.

kpi_cards.style: Minimalist, no heavy shadows. Large metric numbers in Outfit, subtle trend indicators.

animations.bento_stagger: Stagger children animations by 100ms for a premium 'unveiling' effect.

hero_login_background.description: Modern, premium clinic interior in teal/white to use as login or hero background overlay.

ai_feature_bg.description: Abstract sage green organic shapes for AI generated sections or onboarding.

staff_profile_group.description: Diverse healthcare professionals, usable for Staff/Client CRM UI headers.

document_thumbnail.description: Close up of text for PDF previews/Document Hub thumbnails.

medical_abstract.description: Professional medical setup for empty states or dashboard banners.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. Example: data-testid='upload-ndis-form-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the color_palette colors into tailwind.config.js under theme.extend.colors.
Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Ensure the Document Hub is structured with dedicated UI components for the required folders (Appointments, Invoices, Shift Reports, Contacts, BSB Reports, NDIS Forms).
For the PDF Viewer, build a 'Crystal Glass' modal using Shadcn Dialog or a custom fixed overlay with high z-index and backdrop-blur-xl.
AI Integration: Create an aesthetic 'Smart Outreach CRM' or 'AI Assistant' block using the accent color (#C16E5A) and shimmer animations to denote intelligence.
Keep borders very light (border-border) and radius generous (rounded-2xl) to mimic a premium brochure look rather than a rigid data-table.
